## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      1 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 20, 2026 - May 20, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Thomas Strimbu_, May 20, 2026, 5/5: "I was beginning to have glitches with Map My Walk and discovered that Map My Fitness did everything that MMW did, downloaded and installed Map My Fitness, logged in with the same login information as MapMyWalk and everything from that app, the whole historical workout record, synced with MapMyFitness, and have been using MMF ever since. Oh, and the glitches of MMW syncing info to MyFitnessPal calorie counting app are not present with MMF."
